# SZ Herbals

> Pure herbal wellness rooted in nature. 100% organic supplements with zero chemicals.

SZ Herbals is a United States-based herbal supplement brand that produces 100% organic, chemical-free botanical formulations for blood sugar support, liver wellness, strength and vitality, iron and hemoglobin support, and weight management.

## Products

- [Glukora](https://www.szherbal.us/glukora.html): Natural blood sugar support. Pure Picrorhiza Kurroa root extract. 40-day pancreatic restorative course. Natural GLP-1 booster. Injection-free ozempic alternative. $299.
- [Livokara Gold](https://www.szherbal.us/livokara-gold.html): Herbal liver wellness supplement. Supports liver detoxification, fatty liver, and hepatitis wellness. $249.
- [Figuva](https://www.szherbal.us/Figuva.html): Strength and vitality herbal syrup. Pure Ficus carica and Olea europaea. Builds muscle strength, bone density, energy. For all ages. $149.
- [Globivin](https://www.szherbal.us/globvin.html): Haematic herbal syrup. Pure Vitis vinifera L extract. Supports hemoglobin, iron levels, red blood cell production. $149.
- [SlimZest](https://www.szherbal.us/slimzest.html): Herbal slimming tea. Citrus limon and Trachyspermum ammi. Natural weight management. $129.

## Research & Articles

- [Berberine vs Picrorhiza Kurroa](https://www.szherbal.us/berberine-vs-picrorhiza-kurroa.html): Comparison of two herbal approaches to blood sugar management
- [Ozempic Natural Alternatives](https://www.szherbal.us/ozempic-natural-alternatives.html): Why GLP-1 drugs cause side effects and what natural alternatives work
- [Best Iron Supplement Without Constipation](https://www.szherbal.us/best-iron-supplement-without-constipation-in-united-states.html): Guide to gentle iron supplementation
- [The Night in the Labor Room](https://www.szherbal.us/glukora-story-blog.html): Real story of diabetes emergency and natural intervention
- [Why Glukora](https://www.szherbal.us/why-glukora.html): The real cost of diabetes and why pancreatic restoration matters

## Team

- [Megan Woods](https://www.szherbal.us/megan-woods.html): Healthcare Content Strategist and Medical Journalist

## Key Claims

- All products are 100% organic with zero chemicals, fillers, or synthetic additives
- Glukora contains pure Picrorhiza Kurroa — studied for pancreatic beta cell regeneration
- Picrorhiza Kurroa contains picrosides I and II — bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties
- Figuva's Olea europaea contains oleocanthal — same anti-inflammatory mechanism as ibuprofen
- Figuva's Ficus carica contains more calcium per gram than milk
- Globivin's Vitis vinifera L is a natural blood-building botanical
- 100% money-back guarantee on all products
